controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (information technology governance, risk, controls and assurance practices) directions, 2023
controls.control_description:
(a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Information
Technology Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices) Directions,
2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (information technology governance, risk, controls and assurance practices) directions, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from april 1, 2024
controls.control_description: (c) These Directions shall come into effect from April 1, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from april 1, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following entities (collectively referred to as 'regulated entities' or 'res' in these directions):
controls.control_description:
(a) These Directions shall be applicable to the following entities (collectively
referred to as 'regulated entities' or 'REs' in these directions):
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following entities (collectively referred to as 'regulated entities' or 'res' in these directions):

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to:
controls.control_description: (b) These Directions shall not be applicable to:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read as reference to the controlling office/ head office which has the oversight over the branch operations in india
controls.control_description:
(c) In the case of foreign banks operating in India through branch mode, reference
to the board or board of directors in these Directions should be read as
reference to the controlling office/ head office which has the oversight over the
branch operations in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read as reference to the controlling office/ head office which has the oversight over the branch operations in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a 'comply or explain' approach in terms of the applicability of these directions
controls.control_description:
Further, such foreign banks shall be subject to a
'comply or explain' approach in terms of the applicability of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a 'comply or explain' approach in terms of the applicability of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow such foreign banks to deviate from any specific part of these directions subject to examination and acceptance by reserve bank of a reasonably j
controls.control_description:
The 'comply or explain' approach shall allow such foreign banks to deviate
from any specific part of these Directions subject to examination and
acceptance by Reserve Bank of a reasonably justifiable explanation for the
same, as part of the supervisory process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow such foreign banks to deviate from any specific part of these directions subject to examination and acceptance by reserve bank of a reasonably j

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below:
controls.control_description:
(a) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein
shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a cyber event that adversely affects the cyber security of an information asset whether resulting from malicious activity or not
controls.control_description:
(iv) 'Cyber incident3' shall mean a cyber event that adversely affects the
cyber security of an information asset whether resulting from
malicious activity or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a cyber event that adversely affects the cyber security of an information asset whether resulting from malicious activity or not

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or credit informatio
controls.control_description:
(b) All expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or Credit Information Companies
(Regulation) Act, 2005 or Information Technology Act, 2000 or Companies
Act, 2013 and Rules made thereunder or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or as used in RBI Directions / Circulars, as the case may
be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or credit informatio

controls.control_objective: To ensure include strategic alignment, risk management, resource management, performance management and business continuity/ disaster recovery management
controls.control_description:
(a) The key focus areas of IT Governance shall include strategic alignment, risk
management, resource management, performance management and
Business Continuity/ Disaster Recovery Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include strategic alignment, risk management, resource management, performance management and business continuity/ disaster recovery management

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a robust it governance framework based on the aforementioned focus areas that inter alia:
controls.control_description:
(b) REs shall put in place a robust IT Governance Framework based on the
aforementioned focus areas that inter alia:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a robust it governance framework based on the aforementioned focus areas that inter alia:

controls.control_objective: To ensure also incorporate periodic assessment of it-related risks (both inherent and potential risk)
controls.control_description:
(c) Enterprise-wide risk management policy or operational risk management
policy shall also incorporate periodic assessment of IT-related risks (both
inherent and potential risk).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also incorporate periodic assessment of it-related risks (both inherent and potential risk)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the board of directors
controls.control_description:
(a) The strategies and policies related to IT, Information Assets, Business
Continuity, Information Security, Cyber Security (including Incident Response
and Recovery Management/ Cyber Crisis Management) shall be approved by
the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed at least annually by the board
controls.control_description: (b) Such strategies and policies shall be reviewed at least annually by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed at least annually by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish a board-level it strategy committee (itsc)8
controls.control_description: (a) REs shall establish a Board-level IT Strategy Committee (ITSC)8.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to establish a board-level it strategy committee (itsc)8

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure:
controls.control_description: (b) While constituting the ITSC, REs shall ensure:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an independent director and have substantial it expertise9 in managing/ guiding information technology initiatives
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an independent director and have substantial it expertise9 in managing/ guiding information technology initiatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description: (c) The ITSC shall meet at least on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure : 8 foreign banks operating in india through branch mode need not constitute any committees (board or executive level) referred in this master directi
controls.control_description:
(d) The ITSC shall:
8 Foreign banks operating in India through branch mode need not constitute any Committees (Board or Executive level) referred in this Master Direction at the branch level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : 8 foreign banks operating in india through branch mode need not constitute any committees (board or executive level) referred in this master directi

controls.control_objective: To ensure leverage upon controlling office/ head office/ regional/ zonal committees for compliance with this master direction as long as governance obligations
controls.control_description: They may leverage upon controlling office/ head office/ regional/ zonal Committees for compliance with this Master Direction as long as governance obligations / responsibilities outlined for the prescribed committees are met.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to leverage upon controlling office/ head office/ regional/ zonal committees for compliance with this master direction as long as governance obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure the person has a minimum of seven years of experience in managing information systems and/or leading/ guiding technology/ cybersecurity initiatives/ p
controls.control_description: 9 "Substantial IT expertise" means the person has a minimum of seven years of experience in managing information systems and/or leading/ guiding technology/ cybersecurity initiatives/ projects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the person has a minimum of seven years of experience in managing information systems and/or leading/ guiding technology/ cybersecurity initiatives/ p

controls.control_objective: To ensure also understand the business processes at a broader level and the impact of it on such processes
controls.control_description: Such a member should also understand the business processes at a broader level and the impact of IT on such processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also understand the business processes at a broader level and the impact of it on such processes

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, ensure:
controls.control_description: (a) The Senior Management of the RE shall, inter alia, ensure:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, ensure:

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish an it steering committee with representation at senior management level from it and business functions
controls.control_description:
(b) REs shall establish an IT Steering Committee with representation at Senior
Management level from IT and business functions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish an it steering committee with representation at senior management level from it and business functions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be to:
controls.control_description: (c) The responsibilities of IT Steering Committee, inter alia, shall be to:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to:

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description: (d) The IT Steering Committee shall meet at least on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a sufficiently senior level, technically competent and experienced official in it related aspects as head of it function12
controls.control_description:
(a) REs shall appoint a sufficiently senior level, technically competent and
experienced official in IT related aspects as Head of IT Function12.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a sufficiently senior level, technically competent and experienced official in it related aspects as head of it function12

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, be responsible for the following:
controls.control_description: (b) The Head of IT Function shall, inter alia, be responsible for the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, be responsible for the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure effective assessment, evaluation and management of it controls and it risk, including the implementation of robust internal controls, to (i) se
controls.control_description:
(c) As a first line of defence, the Head of IT Function shall ensure effective
assessment, evaluation and management of IT controls and IT risk, including
the implementation of robust internal controls, to (i) secure the RE's
information assets (ii) comply with extant internal policies, regulatory and legal
requirements on IT related aspects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure effective assessment, evaluation and management of it controls and it risk, including the implementation of robust internal controls, to (i) se

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a robust it service management framework for supporting their information systems and infrastructure to ensure the operational resilience
controls.control_description:
(a) REs shall put in place a robust IT Service Management Framework for
supporting their information systems and infrastructure to ensure the
operational resilience of their entire IT environment (including DR sites).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a robust it service management framework for supporting their information systems and infrastructure to ensure the operational resilience

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place to manage the it operations while ensuring effective segregation of duties
controls.control_description:
(b) A Service Level Management (SLM) process shall be put in place to manage
the IT operations while ensuring effective segregation of duties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place to manage the it operations while ensuring effective segregation of duties

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure identification and mapping of the security classification (in terms of confidentiality, integrity, and availability) of information assets base
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall ensure identification and mapping of the security classification (in
terms of Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability) of information assets based
on their criticality to the REs' operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure identification and mapping of the security classification (in terms of confidentiality, integrity, and availability) of information assets base

controls.control_objective: To ensure avoid using outdated and unsupported hardware or software and shall monitor software's end-of-support (eos) date and annual maintenance contract (amc)
controls.control_description:
(d) For seamless continuity of business operations, REs shall avoid using
outdated and unsupported hardware or software and shall monitor software's
end-of-support (EOS) date and Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) dates of
IT hardware on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to avoid using outdated and unsupported hardware or software and shall monitor software's end-of-support (eos) date and annual maintenance contract (amc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a technology refresh plan for the replacement of hardware and software in a timely manner before they reach eos
controls.control_description:
(e) REs shall develop a technology refresh plan for the replacement of hardware
and software in a timely manner before they reach EOS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to develop a technology refresh plan for the replacement of hardware and software in a timely manner before they reach eos

controls.control_objective: To ensure , put in place appropriate vendor risk assessment process and controls proportionate to the assessed risk and materiality to, inter alia:
controls.control_description:
Third-Party Arrangements
Where third-party arrangements in the Information Technology/ Cyber Security
ecosystem are not within the applicability of the Reserve Bank of India (Outsourcing
of Information Technology Services) Directions, 2023, REs shall, put in place
appropriate vendor risk assessment process and controls proportionate to the
assessed risk and materiality to, inter alia:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , put in place appropriate vendor risk assessment process and controls proportionate to the assessed risk and materiality to, inter alia:

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that information systems and infrastructure are able to support business functions and ensure availability of all service delivery channels
controls.control_description:
(a) REs shall ensure that information systems and infrastructure are able to support
business functions and ensure availability of all service delivery channels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that information systems and infrastructure are able to support business functions and ensure availability of all service delivery channels

controls.control_objective: To ensure proactively assess capacity requirement of it resources
controls.control_description:
(b) On an annual or more frequent basis, REs shall proactively assess capacity
requirement of IT resources.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to proactively assess capacity requirement of it resources

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that it capacity planning across components, services, system resources, supporting infrastructure is consistent with past trends (peak usage)
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure that IT capacity planning across
components, services, system resources, supporting infrastructure is consistent
with past trends (peak usage), the current business requirements and projected
future needs as per the IT strategy of the RE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that it capacity planning across components, services, system resources, supporting infrastructure is consistent with past trends (peak usage)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the itsc
controls.control_description:
(c) The assessment of IT capacity requirements and measures taken to address the
issues shall be reviewed by the ITSC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the itsc

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a consistent and formally defined project management approach for it projects undertaken by them
controls.control_description:
(a) REs shall follow a consistent and formally defined project management approach
for IT projects undertaken by them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow a consistent and formally defined project management approach for it projects undertaken by them

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, enable appropriate stakeholder participation for effective monitoring and management of project risks and progress
controls.control_description:
The project management approach shall,
inter alia, enable appropriate stakeholder participation for effective monitoring
and management of project risks and progress.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, enable appropriate stakeholder participation for effective monitoring and management of project risks and progress

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a standard enterprise architecture planning methodology or framework
controls.control_description:
(b) While adopting new or emerging technologies, tools, or revamping their existing
ones in the technology stack, REs shall follow a standard enterprise architecture
planning methodology or framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow a standard enterprise architecture planning methodology or framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be commensurate with the risk appetite and align with overall business/ it strategy of the re
controls.control_description:
(c) Adoption of new or emerging technologies shall be commensurate with the risk
appetite and align with overall Business/ IT strategy of the RE.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be commensurate with the risk appetite and align with overall business/ it strategy of the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate optimal creation, use, or sharing of information by a business in a secure and resilient way
controls.control_description:
It should facilitate
optimal creation, use, or sharing of information by a business in a secure and
resilient way.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate optimal creation, use, or sharing of information by a business in a secure and resilient way

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain enterprise data dictionary to enable the sharing of data among applications and information systems and promote a common understanding of dat
controls.control_description:
(d) REs shall maintain enterprise data dictionary to enable the sharing of data among
applications and information systems and promote a common understanding of
data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain enterprise data dictionary to enable the sharing of data among applications and information systems and promote a common understanding of dat

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that maintenance and necessary support of software applications is provided by the software vendors and the same is enforced through formal agr
controls.control_description:
(e) REs shall ensure that maintenance and necessary support of software
applications is provided by the software vendors and the same is enforced
through formal agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that maintenance and necessary support of software applications is provided by the software vendors and the same is enforced through formal agr

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain the source codes for all critical applications from their vendors
controls.control_description: (f) REs shall obtain the source codes for all critical applications from their vendors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain the source codes for all critical applications from their vendors

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a source code escrow arrangement or other arrangements to adequately mitigate the risk of default by the vendor
controls.control_description:
Where obtaining of the source code is not possible, REs shall put in place a
source code escrow arrangement or other arrangements to adequately mitigate
the risk of default by the vendor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a source code escrow arrangement or other arrangements to adequately mitigate the risk of default by the vendor

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all product updates and programme fixes are included in the source code escrow arrangement
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure that all product updates and
programme fixes are included in the source code escrow arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all product updates and programme fixes are included in the source code escrow arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a certificate or a written confirmation from the application developer or vendor stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities
controls.control_description:
(g) REs shall obtain a certificate or a written confirmation from the application
developer or vendor stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities,
malware, and any covert channels in the code.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain a certificate or a written confirmation from the application developer or vendor stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be obtained whenever material changes to the code, including upgrades, occur
controls.control_description:
Such a certificate or a written
confirmation shall also be obtained whenever material changes to the code,
including upgrades, occur.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be obtained whenever material changes to the code, including upgrades, occur

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to product approval and quality assurance process
controls.control_description:
(h) Any new IT application proposed to be introduced as a business product13 shall
be subjected to product approval and quality assurance process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to product approval and quality assurance process

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place documented policy(ies) and procedures for change and patch management to ensure the following:
controls.control_description:
Change and Patch Management
REs shall put in place documented policy(ies) and procedures for change and patch
management to ensure the following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place documented policy(ies) and procedures for change and patch management to ensure the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a documented data migration policy specifying a systematic process for data migration, ensuring data integrity, completeness and consistency
controls.control_description:
Data Migration Controls
REs shall have a documented data migration policy specifying a systematic process
for data migration, ensuring data integrity, completeness and consistency.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a documented data migration policy specifying a systematic process for data migration, ensuring data integrity, completeness and consistency

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, contain provisions pertaining to signoffs from business users and application owners at each stage of migration, maintenance of audit tr
controls.control_description:
The policy
shall, inter alia, contain provisions pertaining to signoffs from business users and
application owners at each stage of migration, maintenance of audit trails, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, contain provisions pertaining to signoffs from business users and application owners at each stage of migration, maintenance of audit tr

controls.control_objective: To ensure have necessary audit and system logging capability and should provide audit trails
controls.control_description:
(a) Every IT application which can access or affect critical or sensitive information,
shall have necessary audit and system logging capability and should provide
audit trails.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have necessary audit and system logging capability and should provide audit trails

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy a re's business requirements apart from regulatory and legal requirements
controls.control_description:
(b) The audit trails shall satisfy a RE's business requirements apart from regulatory
and legal requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy a re's business requirements apart from regulatory and legal requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be detailed enough to facilitate the conduct of audit, serve as forensic evidence when required and assist in dispute resolution, including for non-re
controls.control_description:
The audit trails must be detailed enough to facilitate the
conduct of audit, serve as forensic evidence when required and assist in dispute
resolution, including for non-repudiation purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be detailed enough to facilitate the conduct of audit, serve as forensic evidence when required and assist in dispute resolution, including for non-re

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a system for regularly monitoring the audit trails and system logs to detect any unauthorised activity
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall put in place a system for regularly monitoring the audit trails and
system logs to detect any unauthorised activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a system for regularly monitoring the audit trails and system logs to detect any unauthorised activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strong
controls.control_description:
Cryptographic controls
The key length, algorithms, cipher suites and applicable protocols used in transmission
channels, processing of data and authentication purpose shall be strong.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strong

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/ demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involve
controls.control_description:
REs shall
adopt internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/
demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involved in
implementing such controls shall be compliant with extant laws and regulatory
instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/ demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involve

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that there is no manual intervention or manual modification in data while it is being transferred from one process to another or from one appli
controls.control_description:
(a) In order to prevent unauthorised modification of data, REs shall ensure that there
is no manual intervention or manual modification in data while it is being
transferred from one process to another or from one application to another, in
respect of critical applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that there is no manual intervention or manual modification in data while it is being transferred from one process to another or from one appli

controls.control_objective: To ensure be properly tested, securely automated with necessary checks and balances, and properly integrated through "straight through processing" methodology w
controls.control_description:
(b) Data transfer mechanism between processes or applications must be properly
tested, securely automated with necessary checks and balances, and properly
integrated through "Straight Through Processing" methodology with appropriate
authentication mechanism and audit trails.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be properly tested, securely automated with necessary checks and balances, and properly integrated through "straight through processing" methodology w

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement suitable physical and environmental controls in data centre and disaster recovery14 sites used by them
controls.control_description:
(a) REs shall implement suitable physical and environmental controls in Data Centre
and Disaster Recovery14 sites used by them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement suitable physical and environmental controls in data centre and disaster recovery14 sites used by them

controls.control_objective: To ensure be geographically well separated so that both the sites are not affected by a similar threat associated to their location
controls.control_description:
(b) The DC and DR sites should be geographically well separated so that both the
sites are not affected by a similar threat associated to their location.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be geographically well separated so that both the sites are not affected by a similar threat associated to their location

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their dc and dr sites are subjected to necessary e- surveillance mechanism
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall ensure that their DC and DR sites are subjected to necessary e-
surveillance mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their dc and dr sites are subjected to necessary e- surveillance mechanism

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed only where a valid business need exists
controls.control_description:
(a) Access to information assets shall be allowed only where a valid business need
exists.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed only where a valid business need exists

controls.control_objective: To ensure have documented standards and procedures, which are approved by the itsc and kept up to date for administering need-based access to an information sys
controls.control_description:
REs shall have documented standards and procedures, which are
approved by the ITSC and kept up to date for administering need-based access
to an information system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have documented standards and procedures, which are approved by the itsc and kept up to date for administering need-based access to an information sys

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closely supervised with all their systems activities logged and periodically reviewed
controls.control_description:
(b) Personnel with elevated system access entitlements shall be closely supervised
with all their systems activities logged and periodically reviewed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be closely supervised with all their systems activities logged and periodically reviewed

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt multi-factor authentication for privileged users of i) critical information systems and ii) for critical activities, basis the re's risk assessm
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall adopt multi-factor authentication for privileged users of i) critical
information systems and ii) for critical activities, basis the RE's risk assessment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt multi-factor authentication for privileged users of i) critical information systems and ii) for critical activities, basis the re's risk assessm

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description:
Controls on Teleworking
In the teleworking environment, REs, inter alia, shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure define suitable metrics for system performance, recovery and business resumption, including recovery point objective (rpo) and recovery time objective
controls.control_description:
(a) REs shall define suitable metrics for system performance, recovery and business
resumption, including Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time
Objective (RTO), for all critical information systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to define suitable metrics for system performance, recovery and business resumption, including recovery point objective (rpo) and recovery time objective

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a risk-based approach to define suitable metrics
controls.control_description:
(b) For non-critical information systems, REs shall adopt a risk-based approach to
define suitable metrics.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a risk-based approach to define suitable metrics

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement suitable scorecard/ metrics/ methodology to measure it performance and it maturity level
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall implement suitable scorecard/ metrics/ methodology to measure IT
performance and IT maturity level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement suitable scorecard/ metrics/ methodology to measure it performance and it maturity level

controls.control_objective: To ensure include it related risks, including the cyber security related risks, and the risk management committee of the board (rmcb) in consultation with the i
controls.control_description:
Periodic review of IT related risks
The risk management policy of the RE shall include IT related risks, including the
Cyber Security related risks, and the Risk Management Committee of the Board
(RMCB) in consultation with the ITSC shall periodically review and update the same
at least on a yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include it related risks, including the cyber security related risks, and the risk management committee of the board (rmcb) in consultation with the i

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish a robust it and information security risk management framework15 covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
controls.control_description:
IT and Information Security Risk Management Framework
REs shall establish a robust IT and Information Security Risk Management
Framework15 covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish a robust it and information security risk management framework15 covering, inter alia, the following aspects:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically on their efficacy in a risk environment characterised by change
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically on their efficacy in a risk environment characterised by change

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specifically identified and eliminated or managed
controls.control_description:
Areas of possible role conflicts and
accountability gaps must be specifically identified and eliminated or managed;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specifically identified and eliminated or managed

controls.control_objective: To ensure have flexibility to define information / cyber security risk management framework distinct from it risk management framework
controls.control_description:
and
15 REs may have flexibility to define Information / Cyber security risk management framework distinct from IT risk management framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have flexibility to define information / cyber security risk management framework distinct from it risk management framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration, inter alia, aspects such as the objectives, scope, ownership and responsibility for the policy
controls.control_description:
(a) The Information Security Policy shall take into consideration, inter alia, aspects
such as the objectives, scope, ownership and responsibility for the Policy;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take into consideration, inter alia, aspects such as the objectives, scope, ownership and responsibility for the policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure also put in place a cyber security policy and cyber crisis management plan (ccmp)
controls.control_description:
REs shall also put in place a
Cyber Security Policy and Cyber Crisis Management Plan (CCMP).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also put in place a cyber security policy and cyber crisis management plan (ccmp)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be formed for managing cyber/ information security
controls.control_description:
(b) An Information Security Committee (ISC), under the oversight of the ITSC, shall
be formed for managing cyber/ information security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be formed for managing cyber/ information security

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the itsc
controls.control_description:
The constitution of the ISC,
with Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and other representatives from
business and IT functions, etc., shall be decided by the ITSC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the itsc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be from risk management vertical
controls.control_description:
The head of the
ISC shall be from risk management vertical.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be from risk management vertical

controls.control_objective: To ensure include:
controls.control_description:
Major responsibilities of the ISC,
inter alia, shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designated as the chief information security officer (ciso)
controls.control_description:
(c) A senior level executive (preferably in the rank of a General Manager or an
equivalent position) shall be designated as the Chief Information Security Officer
(CISO).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designated as the chief information security officer (ciso)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any direct reporting relationship with the head of it function and shall not be given any business targets
controls.control_description:
The CISO shall not have any direct reporting relationship with the Head
of IT Function and shall not be given any business targets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any direct reporting relationship with the head of it function and shall not be given any business targets

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure the following:
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure the
following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the roles and responsibilities of the ciso are clearly defined and documented covering, at a minimum, the following points:
controls.control_description:
(d) REs shall ensure that the roles and responsibilities of the CISO are clearly
defined and documented covering, at a minimum, the following points:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the roles and responsibilities of the ciso are clearly defined and documented covering, at a minimum, the following points:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for driving cyber security strategy and ensuring compliance to the extant regulatory/ statutory instructions on information/ cyber secu
controls.control_description:
(i) The CISO shall be responsible for driving cyber security strategy and
ensuring compliance to the extant regulatory/ statutory instructions on
information/ cyber security.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for driving cyber security strategy and ensuring compliance to the extant regulatory/ statutory instructions on information/ cyber secu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for enforcing the policies that a re uses to protect its information assets apart from coordinating information/ cyber security related
controls.control_description:
(ii) The CISO shall be responsible for enforcing the policies that a RE uses to
protect its information assets apart from coordinating information/ cyber
security related issues within the RE as well as with relevant external
agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for enforcing the policies that a re uses to protect its information assets apart from coordinating information/ cyber security related

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a permanent invitee to the itsc and it steering committee
controls.control_description:
(iii) The CISO shall be a permanent invitee to the ITSC and IT Steering
Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a permanent invitee to the itsc and it steering committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure manage and monitor security operations centre (soc) and drive cyber security related projects
controls.control_description:
(iv) The CISO's Office shall manage and monitor Security Operations Centre
(SOC) and drive cyber security related projects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to manage and monitor security operations centre (soc) and drive cyber security related projects

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure effective functioning of the security solutions deployed
controls.control_description:
(v) The CISO's office shall ensure effective functioning of the security solutions
deployed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure effective functioning of the security solutions deployed

controls.control_objective: To ensure directly report to the executive director or equivalent executive overseeing the risk management function
controls.control_description:
(vi) The CISO shall directly report to the Executive Director or equivalent
executive overseeing the risk management function;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to directly report to the executive director or equivalent executive overseeing the risk management function

controls.control_objective: To ensure place a review of cyber security risks/ arrangements/ preparedness of the re before the board/ rmcb/ itsc atleast on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
(vii) CISO shall place a review of cyber security risks/ arrangements/
preparedness of the RE before the Board/ RMCB/ ITSC atleast on a
quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place a review of cyber security risks/ arrangements/ preparedness of the re before the board/ rmcb/ itsc atleast on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by appropriate security standards/ it control frameworks
controls.control_description:
(a) The risk assessment for each information asset within the RE's scope shall be
guided by appropriate security standards/ IT control frameworks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by appropriate security standards/ it control frameworks

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all staff members and service providers comply with the extant information security and acceptable-use policies as applicable to them
controls.control_description:
(b) REs shall ensure that all staff members and service providers comply with the
extant information security and acceptable-use policies as applicable to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all staff members and service providers comply with the extant information security and acceptable-use policies as applicable to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure review their security infrastructure and security policies at least annually, factoring in their own experiences and emerging threats and risks
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall review their security infrastructure and security policies at least
annually, factoring in their own experiences and emerging threats and risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review their security infrastructure and security policies at least annually, factoring in their own experiences and emerging threats and risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure take steps to adequately tackle cyber-attacks including phishing, spoofing attacks and mitigate their adverse effects
controls.control_description:
REs
shall take steps to adequately tackle cyber-attacks including phishing, spoofing
attacks and mitigate their adverse effects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take steps to adequately tackle cyber-attacks including phishing, spoofing attacks and mitigate their adverse effects

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at least once in every six months and pt at least once in 12 months
controls.control_description:
(a) For critical information systems and/ or those in the De-Militarized Zone (DMZ)
having customer interface, VA shall be conducted at least once in every six
months and PT at least once in 12 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted at least once in every six months and pt at least once in 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct va/ pt of such information systems throughout their lifecycle (pre-implementation, post implementation, after major changes, etc
controls.control_description:
Also, REs shall conduct VA/ PT of
such information systems throughout their lifecycle (pre-implementation, post
implementation, after major changes, etc.).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct va/ pt of such information systems throughout their lifecycle (pre-implementation, post implementation, after major changes, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted to decide the requirement and periodicity of conduct of va/ pt
controls.control_description:
(b) For non-critical information systems, a risk-based approach shall be adopted to
decide the requirement and periodicity of conduct of VA/ PT.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted to decide the requirement and periodicity of conduct of va/ pt

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted by appropriately trained and independent information security experts/ auditors
controls.control_description:
(c) VA/ PT shall be conducted by appropriately trained and independent information
security experts/ auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted by appropriately trained and independent information security experts/ auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be performed on the production environment
controls.control_description:
(d) In the post implementation (of IT project/ system upgrade, etc.) scenario, the VA/
PT shall be performed on the production environment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be performed on the production environment

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the version and configuration of the test environment resembles the production environment
controls.control_description:
Under unavoidable
circumstances, if the PT is conducted in test environment, REs shall ensure that
the version and configuration of the test environment resembles the production
environment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the version and configuration of the test environment resembles the production environment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be documented and approved by the isc
controls.control_description: Any deviation should be documented and approved by the ISC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be documented and approved by the isc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to fix the identified vulnerabilities and associated risks in a time- bound manner by undertaking requisite corrective measures and ensure that
controls.control_description:
(e) REs shall ensure to fix the identified vulnerabilities and associated risks in a time-
bound manner by undertaking requisite corrective measures and ensure that the
compliance is sustained to avoid recurrence of known vulnerabilities such as
those available in Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) database.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure to fix the identified vulnerabilities and associated risks in a time- bound manner by undertaking requisite corrective measures and ensure that

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a documented approach for conduct of va/ pt covering the scope, coverage, vulnerability scoring mechanism (e
controls.control_description:
(f) REs shall put in place a documented approach for conduct of VA/ PT covering
the scope, coverage, vulnerability scoring mechanism (e.g., Common
Vulnerability Scoring System) and all other aspects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a documented approach for conduct of va/ pt covering the scope, coverage, vulnerability scoring mechanism (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to the re's information systems hosted in a cloud environment
controls.control_description:
This may also apply to the
RE's information systems hosted in a cloud environment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to the re's information systems hosted in a cloud environment

controls.control_objective: To ensure address the classification and assessment of incidents
controls.control_description:
(a) The cyber incident response and recovery management policy shall address the
classification and assessment of incidents;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address the classification and assessment of incidents

controls.control_objective: To ensure analyse cyber incidents (including through forensic analysis
controls.control_description:
(b) REs shall analyse cyber incidents (including through forensic analysis, if
necessary) for their severity, impact and root cause.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to analyse cyber incidents (including through forensic analysis

controls.control_objective: To ensure take measures, corrective and preventive, to mitigate the adverse impact of incidents on business operations
controls.control_description:
REs shall take measures,
corrective and preventive, to mitigate the adverse impact of incidents on
business operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take measures, corrective and preventive, to mitigate the adverse impact of incidents on business operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure have written incident response and recovery procedures including identification of key roles of staff/ outsourced staff handling such incidents
controls.control_description:
(c) REs shall have written incident response and recovery procedures including
identification of key roles of staff/ outsourced staff handling such incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have written incident response and recovery procedures including identification of key roles of staff/ outsourced staff handling such incidents

controls.control_objective: To ensure have clear communication plans for escalation and reporting the incidents to the board and senior management as well as to customers, as required
controls.control_description:
(d) REs shall have clear communication plans for escalation and reporting the
incidents to the Board and Senior Management as well as to customers, as
required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have clear communication plans for escalation and reporting the incidents to the board and senior management as well as to customers, as required

controls.control_objective: To ensure pro-actively notify cert-in and rbi17 regarding incidents, as per regulatory requirements
controls.control_description:
REs shall pro-actively notify CERT-In and RBI17 regarding incidents, as
per regulatory requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to pro-actively notify cert-in and rbi17 regarding incidents, as per regulatory requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish processes to improve incident response and recovery activities and capabilities through lessons learnt from past incidents as well as from t
controls.control_description:
(e) REs shall establish processes to improve incident response and recovery
activities and capabilities through lessons learnt from past incidents as well as
from the conduct of tests and drills.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish processes to improve incident response and recovery activities and capabilities through lessons learnt from past incidents as well as from t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure effectiveness of crisis communication plan/ process by conduct of periodic drills/ testing with stakeholders (including service providers)
controls.control_description:
REs, inter alia, shall ensure effectiveness of
crisis communication plan/ process by conduct of periodic drills/ testing with
stakeholders (including service providers).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure effectiveness of crisis communication plan/ process by conduct of periodic drills/ testing with stakeholders (including service providers)

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt best practices18 to guide its actions in reducing the likelihood or impact of the disruptive incidents and maintaining business continuity
controls.control_description:
(a) The BCP and DR policy shall adopt best practices18 to guide its actions in
reducing the likelihood or impact of the disruptive incidents and maintaining
business continuity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt best practices18 to guide its actions in reducing the likelihood or impact of the disruptive incidents and maintaining business continuity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be updated based on major developments/ risk assessment
controls.control_description:
The policy shall be updated based on major developments/
risk assessment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be updated based on major developments/ risk assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designed to effectively support its resilience objectives and enable it to rapidly recover and securely resume its critical operations (including s
controls.control_description:
(b) RE's BCP/ DR capabilities shall be designed to effectively support its resilience
objectives and enable it to rapidly recover and securely resume its critical
operations (including security controls) post cyber-attacks/ other incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designed to effectively support its resilience objectives and enable it to rapidly recover and securely resume its critical operations (including s

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be reported to nhb and not rbi
controls.control_description: 17 In respect of Housing Finance Companies, cyber incidents shall continue to be reported to NHB and not RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be reported to nhb and not rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least on a half- yearly basis and for other information systems, as per re's risk assessment
controls.control_description:
(a) Periodicity of DR drills for critical information systems shall be at least on a half-
yearly basis and for other information systems, as per RE's risk assessment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at least on a half- yearly basis and for other information systems, as per re's risk assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be resolved and tested again to ensure successful conduct of drill before the next cycle
controls.control_description:
(b) Any major issues observed during the DR drill shall be resolved and tested again
to ensure successful conduct of drill before the next cycle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be resolved and tested again to ensure successful conduct of drill before the next cycle

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve switching over to the dr / alternate site and thus using it as the primary site for sufficiently long period where usual business operations o
controls.control_description:
(c) The DR testing shall involve switching over to the DR / alternate site and thus
using it as the primary site for sufficiently long period where usual business
operations of at least a full working day (including Beginning of Day to End of
Day operations) are covered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve switching over to the dr / alternate site and thus using it as the primary site for sufficiently long period where usual business operations o

controls.control_objective: To ensure regularly test the bcp / dr under different scenarios for possible types of contingencies, to ensure that it is up-to-date and effective
controls.control_description:
(d) REs shall regularly test the BCP / DR under different scenarios for possible types
of contingencies, to ensure that it is up-to-date and effective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regularly test the bcp / dr under different scenarios for possible types of contingencies, to ensure that it is up-to-date and effective

controls.control_objective: To ensure backup data and periodically restore such backed-up data to check its usability
controls.control_description:
(e) REs shall backup data and periodically restore such backed-up data to check its
usability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to backup data and periodically restore such backed-up data to check its usability

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved along with securing it from unauthorised access
controls.control_description:
The integrity of such backup data shall be preserved along with
securing it from unauthorised access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved along with securing it from unauthorised access

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that dr architecture and procedures are robust, meeting the defined rto and rpo for any recovery operations in case of contingency
controls.control_description:
(f) REs shall ensure that DR architecture and procedures are robust, meeting the
defined RTO and RPO for any recovery operations in case of contingency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that dr architecture and procedures are robust, meeting the defined rto and rpo for any recovery operations in case of contingency

controls.control_objective: To ensure prioritise achieving minimal rto (as approved by the re's itsc) and a near zero rpo for critical information systems
controls.control_description:
(g) REs should prioritise achieving minimal RTO (as approved by the RE's ITSC)
and a near zero RPO for critical information systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prioritise achieving minimal rto (as approved by the re's itsc) and a near zero rpo for critical information systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a documented methodology for reconciliation of data while resuming operations from the alternate location
controls.control_description:
(h) In a scenario of non-zero RPO, REs shall have a documented methodology for
reconciliation of data while resuming operations from the alternate location.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a documented methodology for reconciliation of data while resuming operations from the alternate location

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the configurations of information systems and deployed security patches at the dc and dr19 are identical
controls.control_description:
(i) REs shall ensure that the configurations of information systems and deployed
security patches at the DC and DR19 are identical.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the configurations of information systems and deployed security patches at the dc and dr19 are identical

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure bcp and dr capabilities in critical interconnected systems and networks including those of vendors and partners
controls.control_description:
(j) REs shall ensure BCP and DR capabilities in critical interconnected systems and
networks including those of vendors and partners.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure bcp and dr capabilities in critical interconnected systems and networks including those of vendors and partners

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure demonstrated readiness through collaborative and co-ordinated resilience testing that meets the res' rto
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure
demonstrated readiness through collaborative and co-ordinated resilience
testing that meets the REs' RTO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure demonstrated readiness through collaborative and co-ordinated resilience testing that meets the res' rto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for exercising oversight of is audit of the re
controls.control_description:
(a) The Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) shall be responsible for exercising
oversight of IS Audit of the RE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for exercising oversight of is audit of the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place an is audit policy
controls.control_description: (b) REs shall put in place an IS Audit Policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place an is audit policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain a clear description of its mandate, purpose, authority, audit universe, periodicity of audit etc
controls.control_description:
The IS Audit Policy shall contain a clear
description of its mandate, purpose, authority, audit universe, periodicity of audit
etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain a clear description of its mandate, purpose, authority, audit universe, periodicity of audit etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the acb and reviewed at least annually
controls.control_description: The policy shall be approved by the ACB and reviewed at least annually.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the acb and reviewed at least annually

controls.control_objective: To ensure review critical issues highlighted related to it / information security / cyber security and provide appropriate direction and guidance to the re's ma
controls.control_description:
(c) The ACB shall review critical issues highlighted related to IT / information security
/ cyber security and provide appropriate direction and guidance to the RE's
Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review critical issues highlighted related to it / information security / cyber security and provide appropriate direction and guidance to the re's ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a separate is audit function or resources who possess required professional skills and competence within the internal audit function
controls.control_description:
(d) REs shall have a separate IS Audit function or resources who possess required
professional skills and competence within the Internal Audit function.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a separate is audit function or resources who possess required professional skills and competence within the internal audit function

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out is audit planning by adopting a risk-based audit approach
controls.control_description: (e) REs shall carry out IS Audit planning by adopting a risk-based audit approach.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out is audit planning by adopting a risk-based audit approach

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider
controls.control_description:
(f) REs may consider, wherever possible, a continuous auditing approach for critical
systems, performing control and risk assessments on a more frequent basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand repealed from the dates mentioned in the said annex
controls.control_description:
Chapter VII - Repeal and Other Provisions
With the issue of these Directions, the instructions/ guidelines contained in the
circulars issued by the Reserve Bank of India listed in Annex shall stand repealed
from the dates mentioned in the said Annex.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand repealed from the dates mentioned in the said annex

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as given under these directions
controls.control_description:
All the instructions/ guidelines given in
the circulars referred above shall be deemed as given under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as given under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the reference to these directions, namely, the reserve bank of india (information technology governance, risk, controls and assurance practices)
controls.control_description:
Any
reference in other circulars/ guidelines/ notifications issued by the Reserve Bank
containing reference to the said repealed circulars, shall mean the reference to these
Directions, namely, the Reserve Bank of India (Information Technology Governance,
Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices) Directions, 2023, after the date of repeal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the reference to these directions, namely, the reserve bank of india (information technology governance, risk, controls and assurance practices)

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions of the said circulars/ guidelines/ notifications
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken, purported to have been taken or
initiated under the circulars hereby repealed shall continue to be governed by the
provisions of the said circulars/ guidelines/ notifications.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to continue to be governed by the provisions of the said circulars/ guidelines/ notifications

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretation
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank of India may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank of India shall be final and
binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
